import logging
import logging.handlers
import queue

log_queue = queue.Queue(-1)
queue_handler = logging.handlers.QueueHandler(log_queue)
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
logger.addHandler(queue_handler)

listener = logging.handlers.QueueListener(
    log_queue,
    logging.FileHandler("/var/log/app.log"),
)
listener.start()

def handle_request(request_data: dict) -> dict:
    logger.info("request_received", extra={"path": request_data["path"]})
    result = process(request_data)
    logger.info("request_completed", extra={"status": 200})
    return result

def process(data: dict) -> dict:
    return {"status": "ok", "data": data}

async def async_handle_request(request_data: dict) -> dict:
    logger.info("async_request_start", extra={"path": request_data["path"]})
    result = await async_process(request_data)
    logger.info("async_request_done")
    return result

async def async_process(data: dict) -> dict:
    return {"status": "ok"}
